subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and eloquent one! Thy noble father in the Abha Kingdom taketh pride in the steadfastness of his devoted, self-sacrificing sons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت ناطق پدر بزرگوار در ملکوت ابهی افتخار بثبوت ابناء جان نثار مینماید و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God
